body.extend: { "file_type": "csv.gz", "sku_map": { "f10602": "M&M'S牛奶巧克力豆袋装94.5g", "f10603": "M&M'S花生牛奶巧克力豆袋装94.5g", "f9403": "绿箭桂花乌龙薄荷口香糖瓶装56g", "f10605": "益达咖啡味40s-56g", "f10902": "绿黄白三箭单片盒 - 2.4g", "f10627": "绿箭薄荷糖茉香栀子乌龙味23.8g", "f10807": "益达脆皮软心无糖口香糖30粒酷爽薄荷味64g", "f10806": "益达脆皮软心无糖口香糖30粒芭乐冰茶味64g", "f10911": "品客薯片酸乳酪洋葱味110g" }, "sku_cal_range": { "bysku2025_period": [ "f10602", "f10603", "f9403", "f10605", "f10902", "f10627", "f10807", "f10806", "f10911" ] }, "sku_ttl_filter": { "f10602": [ "CVS", "Non KA MT", "TT" ], "f10603": [ "CVS", "Non KA MT", "TT" ], "f9403": [ "TT" ], "f10605": [ "Hyper", "Super", "Mini", "CVS" ], "f10902": [ "Hyper", "Super", "Mini", "CVS" ], "f10627": [ "TT" ], "f10807": [ "TT" ], "f10806": [ "TT" ], "f10911": [ "TT" ] }, "sku_is_active": { "f10602": true, "f10603": true, "f9403": true, "f10605": true, "f10902": true, "f10627": true, "f10807": true, "f10806": true, "f10911": true } }
body.summary: { "input": "processor input data description", "output": "processor output data description", "size": "e.g. number of rows", "duration": "duration of processing", "remark": "something..." }
